title: Greek Pastitsio
description: A classic Greek pasta bake, rich and decadent with layers of ground beef, tomato sauce, and creamy bechamel.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
In a large pan, cook ground beef over medium-high heat, breaking it up into small pieces.
Once browned, add tomato sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly add bechamel sauce and stir until thickened.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of pasta.
Follow with a layer of meat sauce, then a layer of bechamel sauce.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of bechamel sauce on top.
Sprinkle kefalograviera cheese over the top.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
